content.json:
# 🔐 Identity Attack Chain
---
Traces identity activity across every layer — from Entra cloud sign-ins through on-premises Active Directory to endpoint logons. Use this workbook to understand the full scope of a user's activity or to detect lateral movement and credential-based attacks.

content.query:
SigninLogs
| summarize
    TotalSignins = count(),
    FailedSignins = countif(ResultType != '0'),
    RiskySignins = countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location)
| project TotalSignins, FailedSignins, RiskySignins, UniqueUsers, UniqueLocations
content.title: Sign-in summary (interactive)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != '0'
| summarize FailedCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Failed sign-ins over time

content.query:
SigninLogs
| summarize SigninCount = count() by Location
| where isnotempty(Location)
| sort by SigninCount desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 sign-in locations

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    IPAddress,
    Location,
    AppDisplayName,
    RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
    RiskState,
    RiskEventTypes_V2,
    ResultType,
    ConditionalAccessStatus
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Risky interactive sign-ins

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserPrincipalName,
    IPAddress,
    AppDisplayName,
    RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
    RiskState,
    ResultType,
    ClientAppUsed
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Risky non-interactive sign-ins

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName in (
    'Add member to role',
    'Remove member from role',
    'Add user',
    'Delete user',
    'Reset user password',
    'Change user password',
    'Add group',
    'Delete group',
    'Add member to group',
    'Remove member from group',
    'Add application',
    'Add service principal'
)
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedByApp = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, InitiatedByApp)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ActivityDisplayName, Actor, Result, TargetResources
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Sensitive directory changes

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName in ('Add member to role', 'Remove member from role')
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend InitiatedByApp = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName)
| extend Actor = iff(isnotempty(InitiatedByUser), InitiatedByUser, InitiatedByApp)
| summarize ChangeCount = count() by OperationName, Actor
| sort by ChangeCount desc
content.title: Role assignment changes by actor

content.query:
AuditLogs
| summarize ChangeCount = count() by ActivityDisplayName
| sort by ChangeCount desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 audit operations

content.query:
IdentityLogonEvents
| summarize
    TotalLogons = count(),
    FailedLogons = countif(ActionType == 'LogonFailed'),
    LDAPCleartext = countif(Protocol == 'LDAP' and ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'),
    NTLMLogons = countif(Protocol == 'Ntlm')
| project TotalLogons, FailedLogons, LDAPCleartext, NTLMLogons
content.title: On-premises authentication summary

content.query:
IdentityLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize FailedCount = count() by AccountUpn, IPAddress
| where FailedCount > 5
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 20
content.title: On-premises logon failures (>5 attempts) — potential brute force

content.query:
IdentityDirectoryEvents
| where ActionType in (
    'Account Password changed',
    'Account Password reset',
    'Account Locked',
    'Account Disabled',
    'Group Membership changed',
    'Sensitive Group Membership changed'
)
| project TimeGenerated, ActionType, AccountUpn, TargetAccountUpn, AccountDisplayName, DeviceName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Sensitive AD directory events

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize FailedCount = count() by AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName
| where FailedCount > 5
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Endpoint logon failures (>5 attempts)

content.query:
DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'RemoteInteractive'
| summarize RDPCount = count() by AccountName, AccountDomain, DeviceName, RemoteIP
| sort by RDPCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Remote desktop (RDP) logons — top sessions

content.json: ## 🔗 Cross-Layer Correlation — Users with Activity Across Multiple Layers

content.query:
let CloudRisky = SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| summarize CloudRiskySignins = count() by UserPrincipalName;
let OnPremFailed = IdentityLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize OnPremFailures = count() by AccountUpn;
let DeviceFailed = DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize DeviceFailures = count() by AccountName;
CloudRisky
| join kind=leftouter (
    OnPremFailed
    | project UserPrincipalName = AccountUpn, OnPremFailures
) on UserPrincipalName
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFailed
    | extend UserPrincipalName = tolower(AccountName)
) on UserPrincipalName
| project UserPrincipalName, CloudRiskySignins, OnPremFailures = coalesce(OnPremFailures, 0), DeviceFailures = coalesce(DeviceFailures, 0)
| where CloudRiskySignins > 0
| sort by CloudRiskySignins desc
content.title: Users with risk signals across cloud, on-premises, and endpoint

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID in (4624, 4625, 4648, 4768, 4769, 4771)
| summarize
    SuccessfulLogons = countif(EventID == 4624),
    FailedLogons = countif(EventID == 4625),
    ExplicitCredentials = countif(EventID == 4648),
    KerberosRequests = countif(EventID == 4768),
    KerberosFailures = countif(EventID == 4771)
| project SuccessfulLogons, FailedLogons, ExplicitCredentials, KerberosRequests, KerberosFailures
content.title: Windows server logon event summary

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailedCount = count() by TargetUserName, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailedCount > 10
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Accounts with >10 failed logons on Windows servers (event 4625)

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4648
| project TimeGenerated, Account, TargetUserName, TargetServerName, IpAddress, Computer
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Explicit credential use (event 4648) — potential pass-the-hash indicator
